steps.message:
# Bug Investigation: Non-legacy mail content fails to decrypt

**Repository:** tutao/tutanota
**Task Type:** Find and Prove (write a regression test)

## Reported Issue

Users who have accounts with the new (non-legacy) permission model report that opening certain emails results in blank message bodies, missing reply-to addresses, and missing attachment listings. The browser console shows "Missing decryption key" errors when these mails are opened.

The issue specifically affects mails that use owner-encrypted session keys under the new permission model. Legacy mails continue to work correctly. The problem manifests when:

1. Opening a non-legacy mail in the inbox — the body fails to render
2. Opening a draft with reply-to recipients — the reply-to list cannot be loaded
3. The mail indexer/search encounters non-legacy mails — indexing fails silently with decryption errors

The root cause involves how encrypted session keys are propagated when loading related entities. When the application loads supplementary mail data (body content, draft details), the session key needed for decryption is available from the parent mail object but is not being passed through to the entity loading and caching layers. This means the loaded entities cannot be decrypted even though the necessary key exists.

Additionally, batch loading of multiple entities has the same propagation gap — when loading several related items at once, the per-entity session keys are not forwarded to the decryption step.

## Your Task

1. Investigate the codebase to find the root cause of the missing key propagation
2. Write a regression test as a single file at `/workspace/regression_test.test.ts`
3. Your test must be self-contained and runnable with `npx jest --timeout=60000 /workspace/regression_test.test.ts`

## Constraints

- Do NOT fix the bug — only write a test that demonstrates it
- Your test must fail for the RIGHT reason (decryption key not propagated, not some other error)
- Test timeout: 60 seconds
I'll help you investigate this bug and write a regression test. Let me start by exploring the repository structure and understanding the codebase.

   153→	private phishingMarkers: Set<string> = new Set()
   154→	private deferredDraftId: IdTuple | null = null // the mail id of the draft that we are waiting for to be updated via websocket
   155→	private deferredDraftUpdate: Record<string, any> | null = null // this deferred promise is resolved as soon as the update of the draft is received
   156→
   157→	constructor(
   158→		private readonly userFacade: UserFacade,
   159→		private readonly fileFacade: FileFacade,
   160→		private readonly entityClient: EntityClient,

   168→	async createMailFolder(name: string, parent: IdTuple | null, ownerGroupId: Id): Promise<void> {
   169→		const mailGroupKey = this.userFacade.getGroupKey(ownerGroupId)
   170→
   171→		const sk = aes128RandomKey()
   172→		const newFolder = createCreateMailFolderData({
   173→			folderName: name,
   174→			parentFolder: parent,
   175→			ownerEncSessionKey: encryptKey(mailGroupKey, sk),
   176→			ownerGroup: ownerGroupId,
   177→		})
   178→		await this.serviceExecutor.post(MailFolderService, newFolder, { sessionKey: sk })
   179→	}
   180→
   181→	/**
   182→	 * Updates a mail folder's name, if needed
   183→	 * @param newName - if this is the same as the folder's current name, nothing is done
   184→	 */
   185→	async updateMailFolderName(folder: MailFolder, newName: string): Promise<void> {
   186→		if (newName !== folder.name) {
   187→			folder.name = newName
   188→			await this.entityClient.update(folder)
   189→		}
   190→	}
   191→
   192→	/**
   193→	 * Updates a mail folder's parent, if needed
   194→	 * @param newParent - if this is the same as the folder's current parent, nothing is done
   195→	 */
   196→	async updateMailFolderParent(folder: MailFolder, newParent: IdTuple | null): Promise<void> {
   197→		if (
   198→			(folder.parentFolder != null && newParent != null && !isSameId(folder.parentFolder, newParent)) ||
   199→			(folder.parentFolder == null && newParent != null) ||
   200→			(folder.parentFolder != null && newParent == null)
   201→		) {
   202→			const updateFolder = createUpdateMailFolderData({
   203→				folder: folder._id,
   204→				newParent: newParent,
   205→			})
   206→			await this.serviceExecutor.put(MailFolderService, updateFolder)
   207→		}
   208→	}
   209→
   210→	/**
   211→	 * Creates a draft mail.
   212→	 * @param bodyText The bodyText of the mail formatted as HTML.
   213→	 * @param previousMessageId The id of the message that this mail is a reply or forward to. Null if this is a new mail.
   214→	 * @param attachments The files that shall be attached to this mail or null if no files shall be attached. TutanotaFiles are already exising on the server, DataFiles are files from the local file system. Attention: the DataFile class information is lost
   215→	 * @param confidential True if the mail shall be sent end-to-end encrypted, false otherwise.
   216→	 */
   217→	async createDraft({
   218→		subject,
   219→		bodyText,
   220→		senderMailAddress,
   221→		senderName,
   222→		toRecipients,
   223→		ccRecipients,
   224→		bccRecipients,
   225→		conversationType,
   226→		previousMessageId,
   227→		attachments,
   228→		confidential,
   229→		replyTos,
   230→		method,
   231→	}: CreateDraftParams): Promise<Mail> {
   232→		if (byteLength(bodyText) > UNCOMPRESSED_MAX_SIZE) {
   233→			throw new MailBodyTooLargeError(`Can't update draft, mail body too large (${byteLength(bodyText)})`)
   234→		}
   235→
   236→		const senderMailGroupId = await this._getMailGroupIdForMailAddress(this.userFacade.getLoggedInUser(), senderMailAddress)
   237→
   238→		const userGroupKey = this.userFacade.getUserGroupKey()
   239→
   240→		const mailGroupKey = this.userFacade.getGroupKey(senderMailGroupId)
   241→
   242→		const sk = aes128RandomKey()
   243→		const service = createDraftCreateData()
   244→		service.previousMessageId = previousMessageId
   245→		service.conversationType = conversationType
   246→		service.ownerEncSessionKey = encryptKey(mailGroupKey, sk)
   247→		service.symEncSessionKey = encryptKey(userGroupKey, sk) // legacy
   248→
   249→		service.draftData = createDraftData({
   250→			subject,
   251→			compressedBodyText: bodyText,
   252→			senderMailAddress,
   253→			senderName,
   254→			confidential,
   255→			method,
   256→			toRecipients: toRecipients.map(recipientToDraftRecipient),
   257→			ccRecipients: ccRecipients.map(recipientToDraftRecipient),
   258→			bccRecipients: bccRecipients.map(recipientToDraftRecipient),
   259→			replyTos: replyTos.map(recipientToEncryptedMailAddress),
   260→			addedAttachments: await this._createAddedAttachments(attachments, [], senderMailGroupId, mailGroupKey),
   261→		})
   262→		const createDraftReturn = await this.serviceExecutor.post(DraftService, service, { sessionKey: sk })
   263→		return this.entityClient.load(MailTypeRef, createDraftReturn.draft)
   264→	}
   265→
   266→	/**
   267→	 * Updates a draft mail.
   268→	 * @param subject The subject of the mail.
   269→	 * @param body The body text of the mail.
   270→	 * @param senderMailAddress The senders mail address.
   271→	 * @param senderName The name of the sender that is sent together with the mail address of the sender.
   272→	 * @param toRecipients The recipients the mail shall be sent to.
   273→	 * @param ccRecipients The recipients the mail shall be sent to in cc.
   274→	 * @param bccRecipients The recipients the mail shall be sent to in bcc.
   275→	 * @param attachments The files that shall be attached to this mail or null if the current attachments shall not be changed.
   276→	 * @param confidential True if the mail shall be sent end-to-end encrypted, false otherwise.
   277→	 * @param draft The draft to update.
   278→	 * @return The updated draft. Rejected with TooManyRequestsError if the number allowed mails was exceeded, AccessBlockedError if the customer is not allowed to send emails currently because he is marked for approval.
   279→	 */
   280→	async updateDraft({
   281→		subject,
   282→		body,
   283→		senderMailAddress,
   284→		senderName,
   285→		toRecipients,
   286→		ccRecipients,
   287→		bccRecipients,
   288→		attachments,
   289→		confidential,
   290→		draft,
   291→	}: UpdateDraftParams): Promise<Mail> {
   292→		if (byteLength(body) > UNCOMPRESSED_MAX_SIZE) {
   293→			throw new MailBodyTooLargeError(`Can't update draft, mail body too large (${byteLength(body)})`)
   294→		}
   295→
   296→		const senderMailGroupId = await this._getMailGroupIdForMailAddress(this.userFacade.getLoggedInUser(), senderMailAddress)
   297→
   298→		const mailGroupKey = this.userFacade.getGroupKey(senderMailGroupId)
   299→		const currentAttachments = await this.getAttachmentIds(draft)
   300→		const replyTos = await this.getReplyTos(draft)
   301→
   302→		const sk = decryptKey(mailGroupKey, draft._ownerEncSessionKey as any)
   303→		const service = createDraftUpdateData()
   304→		service.draft = draft._id
   305→		service.draftData = createDraftData({
   306→			subject: subject,
   307→			compressedBodyText: body,
   308→			senderMailAddress: senderMailAddress,
   309→			senderName: senderName,
   310→			confidential: confidential,
   311→			method: draft.method,
   312→			toRecipients: toRecipients.map(recipientToDraftRecipient),
   313→			ccRecipients: ccRecipients.map(recipientToDraftRecipient),
   314→			bccRecipients: bccRecipients.map(recipientToDraftRecipient),
   315→			replyTos: replyTos,
   316→			removedAttachments: this._getRemovedAttachments(attachments, currentAttachments),
   317→			addedAttachments: await this._createAddedAttachments(attachments, currentAttachments, senderMailGroupId, mailGroupKey),
   318→		})
   319→		this.deferredDraftId = draft._id
   320→		// we have to wait for the updated mail because sendMail() might be called right after this update
   321→		this.deferredDraftUpdate = defer()
   322→		// use a local reference here because this._deferredDraftUpdate is set to null when the event is received async
   323→		const deferredUpdatePromiseWrapper = this.deferredDraftUpdate
   324→		await this.serviceExecutor.put(DraftService, service, { sessionKey: sk })
   325→		return deferredUpdatePromiseWrapper.promise
   326→	}
   327→

   350→	/**
   351→	 * Returns all ids of the files that have been removed, i.e. that are contained in the existingFileIds but not in the provided files
   352→	 */
   353→	_getRemovedAttachments(providedFiles: Attachments | null, existingFileIds: IdTuple[]): IdTuple[] {
   354→		let removedAttachmentIds: IdTuple[] = []
   355→
   356→		if (providedFiles != null) {
   357→			let attachments = providedFiles
   358→			// check which attachments have been removed
   359→			existingFileIds.forEach((fileId) => {
   360→				if (
   361→					!attachments.find(
   362→						(attachment) => attachment._type !== "DataFile" && attachment._type !== "FileReference" && isSameId(getLetId(attachment), fileId),
   363→					)
   364→				) {
   365→					removedAttachmentIds.push(fileId)
   366→				}
   367→			})
   368→		}
   369→
   370→		return removedAttachmentIds
   371→	}
   372→
   373→	/**
   374→	 * Uploads the given data files or sets the file if it is already existing files (e.g. forwarded files) and returns all DraftAttachments
   375→	 */
   376→	async _createAddedAttachments(
   377→		providedFiles: Attachments | null,
   378→		existingFileIds: ReadonlyArray<IdTuple>,
   379→		senderMailGroupId: Id,
   380→		mailGroupKey: Aes128Key,
   381→	): Promise<DraftAttachment[]> {
   382→		if (providedFiles == null || providedFiles.length === 0) return []
   383→
   384→		return promiseMap(providedFiles, async (providedFile) => {
   385→			// check if this is a new attachment or an existing one
   386→			if (isDataFile(providedFile)) {
   387→				// user added attachment
   388→				const fileSessionKey = aes128RandomKey()
   389→				let referenceTokens: Array<BlobReferenceTokenWrapper>
   390→				if (isApp() || isDesktop()) {
   391→					const { location } = await this.fileApp.writeDataFile(providedFile)
   392→					referenceTokens = await this.blobFacade.encryptAndUploadNative(ArchiveDataType.Attachments, location, senderMailGroupId, fileSessionKey)
   393→					await this.fileApp.deleteFile(location)
   394→				} else {
   395→					referenceTokens = await this.blobFacade.encryptAndUpload(ArchiveDataType.Attachments, providedFile.data, senderMailGroupId, fileSessionKey)
   396→				}
   397→				return this.createAndEncryptDraftAttachment(referenceTokens, fileSessionKey, providedFile, mailGroupKey)
   398→			} else if (isFileReference(providedFile)) {
   399→				const fileSessionKey = aes128RandomKey()
   400→				const referenceTokens = await this.blobFacade.encryptAndUploadNative(
   401→					ArchiveDataType.Attachments,
   402→					providedFile.location,
   403→					senderMailGroupId,
   404→					fileSessionKey,
   405→				)
   406→				return this.createAndEncryptDraftAttachment(referenceTokens, fileSessionKey, providedFile, mailGroupKey)
   407→			} else if (!containsId(existingFileIds, getLetId(providedFile))) {
   408→				// forwarded attachment which was not in the draft before
   409→				return this.crypto.resolveSessionKeyForInstance(providedFile).then((fileSessionKey) => {
   410→					const attachment = createDraftAttachment()
   411→					attachment.existingFile = getLetId(providedFile)
   412→					attachment.ownerEncFileSessionKey = encryptKey(mailGroupKey, assertNotNull(fileSessionKey, "filesessionkey was not resolved"))
   413→					return attachment
   414→				})
   415→			} else {
   416→				return null
   417→			}
   418→		}) // disable concurrent file upload to avoid timeout because of missing progress events on Firefox.
   419→			.then((attachments) => attachments.filter(isNotNull))
   420→			.then((it) => {
   421→				// only delete the temporary files after all attachments have been uploaded
   422→				if (isApp()) {
   423→					this.fileFacade.clearFileData().catch((e) => console.warn("Failed to clear files", e))
   424→				}
   425→
   426→				return it
   427→			})
   428→	}
   429→
   430→	private createAndEncryptDraftAttachment(
   431→		referenceTokens: BlobReferenceTokenWrapper[],
   432→		fileSessionKey: Aes128Key,
   433→		providedFile: DataFile | FileReference,
   434→		mailGroupKey: Aes128Key,
   435→	): DraftAttachment {
   436→		let attachment = createDraftAttachment()
   437→		let newAttachmentData = createNewDraftAttachment()
   438→		newAttachmentData.encFileName = encryptString(fileSessionKey, providedFile.name)
   439→		newAttachmentData.encMimeType = encryptString(fileSessionKey, providedFile.mimeType)
   440→		newAttachmentData.fileData = null
   441→		newAttachmentData.referenceTokens = referenceTokens
   442→		newAttachmentData.encCid = providedFile.cid == null ? null : encryptString(fileSessionKey, providedFile.cid)
   443→		attachment.newFile = newAttachmentData
   444→		attachment.ownerEncFileSessionKey = encryptKey(mailGroupKey, fileSessionKey)
   445→		return attachment
   446→	}
   447→
   448→	async sendDraft(draft: Mail, recipients: Array<Recipient>, language: string): Promise<void> {
   449→		const senderMailGroupId = await this._getMailGroupIdForMailAddress(this.userFacade.getLoggedInUser(), draft.sender.address)
   450→		const bucketKey = aes128RandomKey()
   451→		const sendDraftData = createSendDraftData()
   452→		sendDraftData.language = language
   453→		sendDraftData.mail = draft._id
   454→
   455→		const attachments = await this.getAttachmentIds(draft)
   456→		for (let fileId of attachments) {
   457→			const file = await this.entityClient.load(FileTypeRef, fileId)
   458→			const fileSessionKey = assertNotNull(await this.crypto.resolveSessionKeyForInstance(file), "fileSessionKey was null")
   459→			const data = createAttachmentKeyData({
   460→				file: fileId,
   461→			})
   462→
   463→			if (draft.confidential) {
   464→				data.bucketEncFileSessionKey = encryptKey(bucketKey, fileSessionKey)
   465→			} else {
   466→				data.fileSessionKey = keyToUint8Array(fileSessionKey)
   467→			}
   468→
   469→			sendDraftData.attachmentKeyData.push(data)
   470→		}
   471→
   472→		await Promise.all([
   473→			this.entityClient.loadRoot(TutanotaPropertiesTypeRef, this.userFacade.getUserGroupId()).then((tutanotaProperties) => {
   474→				sendDraftData.plaintext = tutanotaProperties.sendPlaintextOnly
   475→			}),
   476→			this.crypto.resolveSessionKeyForInstance(draft).then((mailSessionkey) => {
   477→				let sk = assertNotNull(mailSessionkey, "mailSessionKey was null")
   478→				sendDraftData.calendarMethod = draft.method !== MailMethod.NONE
   479→
   480→				if (draft.confidential) {
   481→					sendDraftData.bucketEncMailSessionKey = encryptKey(bucketKey, sk)
   482→					const hasExternalSecureRecipient = recipients.some((r) => r.type === RecipientType.EXTERNAL && !!this.getContactPassword(r.contact)?.trim())
   483→
   484→					if (hasExternalSecureRecipient) {
   485→						sendDraftData.senderNameUnencrypted = draft.sender.name // needed for notification mail
   486→					}
   487→
   488→					return this._addRecipientKeyData(bucketKey, sendDraftData, recipients, senderMailGroupId)
   489→				} else {
   490→					sendDraftData.mailSessionKey = bitArrayToUint8Array(sk)
   491→				}
   492→			}),
   493→		])
   494→		await this.serviceExecutor.post(SendDraftService, sendDraftData)
   495→	}
   496→
   497→	async getAttachmentIds(draft: Mail): Promise<IdTuple[]> {
   498→		return draft.attachments
   499→	}

   501→	async getReplyTos(draft: Mail): Promise<EncryptedMailAddress[]> {
   502→		if (isLegacyMail(draft)) {
   503→			return draft.replyTos
   504→		} else {
   505→			const mailDetails = await this.entityClient.load(MailDetailsDraftTypeRef, assertNotNull(draft.mailDetailsDraft, "draft without mailDetailsDraft"))
   506→			return mailDetails.details.replyTos
   507→		}
   508→	}

   510→	checkMailForPhishing(
   511→		mail: Mail,
   512→		links: Array<{
   513→			href: string
   514→			innerHTML: string
   515→		}>,
   516→	): Promise<boolean> {
   517→		let score = 0
   518→		const senderAddress = mail.sender.address
   519→		const senderAuthenticated = mail.authStatus === MailAuthStatus.AUTHENTICATED
   520→
   521→		if (senderAuthenticated) {
   522→			if (this._checkFieldForPhishing(ReportedMailFieldType.FROM_ADDRESS, senderAddress)) {
   523→				score += 6
   524→			} else {
   525→				const senderDomain = addressDomain(senderAddress)
   526→
   527→				if (this._checkFieldForPhishing(ReportedMailFieldType.FROM_DOMAIN, senderDomain)) {
   528→					score += 6
   529→				}
   530→			}
   531→		} else {
   532→			if (this._checkFieldForPhishing(ReportedMailFieldType.FROM_ADDRESS_NON_AUTH, senderAddress)) {
   533→				score += 6
   534→			} else {
   535→				const senderDomain = addressDomain(senderAddress)
   536→
   537→				if (this._checkFieldForPhishing(ReportedMailFieldType.FROM_DOMAIN_NON_AUTH, senderDomain)) {
   538→					score += 6
   539→				}
   540→			}
   541→		}
   542→
   543→		// We check that subject exists because when there's an encryption error it will be missing
   544→		if (mail.subject && this._checkFieldForPhishing(ReportedMailFieldType.SUBJECT, mail.subject)) {
   545→			score += 3
   546→		}
   547→
   548→		for (const link of links) {
   549→			if (this._checkFieldForPhishing(ReportedMailFieldType.LINK, link.href)) {
   550→				score += 6
   551→				break
   552→			} else {
   553→				const domain = getUrlDomain(link.href)
   554→
   555→				if (domain && this._checkFieldForPhishing(ReportedMailFieldType.LINK_DOMAIN, domain)) {
   556→					score += 6
   557→					break
   558→				}
   559→			}
   560→		}
   561→
   562→		const hasSuspiciousLink = links.some(({ href, innerHTML }) => {
   563→			const innerText = htmlToText(innerHTML)
   564→			const textUrl = parseUrl(innerText)
   565→			const hrefUrl = parseUrl(href)
   566→			return textUrl && hrefUrl && textUrl.hostname !== hrefUrl.hostname
   567→		})
   568→
   569→		if (hasSuspiciousLink) {
   570→			score += 6
   571→		}
   572→
   573→		return Promise.resolve(7 < score)
   574→	}

   599→	async _addRecipientKeyData(bucketKey: Aes128Key, service: SendDraftData, recipients: Array<Recipient>, senderMailGroupId: Id): Promise<void> {
   600→		const notFoundRecipients: string[] = []
   601→
   602→		for (let recipient of recipients) {
   603→			if (recipient.address === "system@tutanota.de" || !recipient) {
   604→				notFoundRecipients.push(recipient.address)
   605→				continue
   606→			}
   607→
   608→			// copy password information if this is an external contact
   609→			// otherwise load the key information from the server
   610→			if (recipient.type === RecipientType.EXTERNAL) {
   611→				const password = this.getContactPassword(recipient.contact)
   612→
   613→				if (password == null || !isSameId(this.userFacade.getGroupId(GroupType.Mail), senderMailGroupId)) {
   614→					// no password given and prevent sending to secure externals from shared group
   615→					notFoundRecipients.push(recipient.address)
   616→					continue
   617→				}
   618→
   619→				const kdfVersion = this.loginFacade.pickKdfType(KdfType.Bcrypt)
   620→				const salt = generateRandomSalt()
   621→				const passwordKey = await this.loginFacade.deriveUserPassphraseKey(kdfVersion, password, salt)
   622→				const passwordVerifier = createAuthVerifier(passwordKey)
   623→				const externalGroupKeys = await this._getExternalGroupKey(recipient.address, passwordKey, passwordVerifier)
   624→				const data = createSecureExternalRecipientKeyData()
   625→				data.mailAddress = recipient.address
   626→				data.symEncBucketKey = null // legacy for old permission system, not used any more
   627→				data.kdfVersion = kdfVersion
   628→				data.ownerEncBucketKey = encryptKey(externalGroupKeys.externalMailGroupKey, bucketKey)
   629→				data.passwordVerifier = passwordVerifier
   630→				data.salt = salt
   631→				data.saltHash = sha256Hash(salt)
   632→				data.pwEncCommunicationKey = encryptKey(passwordKey, externalGroupKeys.externalUserGroupKey)
   633→				service.secureExternalRecipientKeyData.push(data)
   634→			} else {
   635→				const keyData = await this.crypto.encryptBucketKeyForInternalRecipient(bucketKey, recipient.address, notFoundRecipients)
   636→
   637→				if (keyData) {
   638→					service.internalRecipientKeyData.push(keyData)
   639→				}
   640→			}
   641→		}
   642→
   643→		if (notFoundRecipients.length > 0) {
   644→			throw new RecipientsNotFoundError(notFoundRecipients.join("\n"))
   645→		}
   646→	}

   648→	private getContactPassword(contact: Contact | null): string | null {
   649→		return contact?.presharedPassword ?? contact?.autoTransmitPassword ?? null
   650→	}

   652→	/**
   653→	 * Checks that an external user instance with a mail box exists for the given recipient. If it does not exist, it is created.
   654→	 * Returns the user group key and the user mail group key of the external recipient.
   655→	 * @param recipientMailAddress
   656→	 * @param externalUserPwKey The external user's password key.
   657→	 * @param verifier The external user's verifier, base64 encoded.
   658→	 * @return Resolves to the the external user's group key and the external user's mail group key, rejected if an error occured
   659→	 */
   660→	_getExternalGroupKey(
   661→		recipientMailAddress: string,
   662→		externalUserPwKey: Aes128Key,
   663→		verifier: Uint8Array,
   664→	): Promise<{
   665→		externalUserGroupKey: Aes128Key
   666→		externalMailGroupKey: Aes128Key
   667→	}> {
   668→		return this.entityClient.loadRoot(GroupRootTypeRef, this.userFacade.getUserGroupId()).then((groupRoot) => {
   669→			let cleanedMailAddress = recipientMailAddress.trim().toLocaleLowerCase()
   670→			let mailAddressId = stringToCustomId(cleanedMailAddress)
   671→			return this.entityClient
   672→				.load(ExternalUserReferenceTypeRef, [groupRoot.externalUserReferences, mailAddressId])
   673→				.then((externalUserReference) => {
   674→					return this.entityClient.load(UserTypeRef, externalUserReference.user).then((externalUser) => {
   675→						let mailGroupId = assertNotNull(
   676→							externalUser.memberships.find((m) => m.groupType === GroupType.Mail),
   677→							"no mail group membership on external user",
   678→						).group
   679→						return Promise.all([
   680→							this.entityClient.load(GroupTypeRef, mailGroupId),
   681→							this.entityClient.load(GroupTypeRef, externalUserReference.userGroup),
   682→						]).then(([externalMailGroup, externalUserGroup]) => {
   683→							const userAdminKey = assertNotNull(externalUserGroup.adminGroupEncGKey, "no adminGroupEncGKey on external user group")
   684→							const mailAdminKey = assertNotNull(externalMailGroup.adminGroupEncGKey, "no adminGroupEncGKey on external mail group")
   685→							let externalUserGroupKey = decryptKey(this.userFacade.getUserGroupKey(), userAdminKey)
   686→							let externalMailGroupKey = decryptKey(externalUserGroupKey, mailAdminKey)
   687→							return {
   688→								externalUserGroupKey,
   689→								externalMailGroupKey,
   690→							}
   691→						})
   692→					})
   693→				})
   694→				.catch(
   695→					ofClass(NotFoundError, (e) => {
   696→						// it does not exist, so create it
   697→						let internalMailGroupKey = this.userFacade.getGroupKey(this.userFacade.getGroupId(GroupType.Mail))
   698→
   699→						let externalUserGroupKey = aes128RandomKey()
   700→						let externalMailGroupKey = aes128RandomKey()
   701→						let externalUserGroupInfoSessionKey = aes128RandomKey()
   702→						let externalMailGroupInfoSessionKey = aes128RandomKey()
   703→						let clientKey = aes128RandomKey()
   704→						let tutanotaPropertiesSessionKey = aes128RandomKey()
   705→						let mailboxSessionKey = aes128RandomKey()
   706→						let userEncEntropy = encryptBytes(externalUserGroupKey, random.generateRandomData(32))
   707→						let d = createExternalUserData()
   708→						d.verifier = verifier
   709→						d.userEncClientKey = encryptKey(externalUserGroupKey, clientKey)
   710→						d.externalUserEncUserGroupInfoSessionKey = encryptKey(externalUserGroupKey, externalUserGroupInfoSessionKey)
   711→						d.internalMailEncUserGroupInfoSessionKey = encryptKey(internalMailGroupKey, externalUserGroupInfoSessionKey)
   712→						d.externalUserEncMailGroupKey = encryptKey(externalUserGroupKey, externalMailGroupKey)
   713→						d.externalMailEncMailGroupInfoSessionKey = encryptKey(externalMailGroupKey, externalMailGroupInfoSessionKey)
   714→						d.internalMailEncMailGroupInfoSessionKey = encryptKey(internalMailGroupKey, externalMailGroupInfoSessionKey)
   715→						d.externalUserEncEntropy = userEncEntropy
   716→						d.externalUserEncTutanotaPropertiesSessionKey = encryptKey(externalUserGroupKey, tutanotaPropertiesSessionKey)
   717→						d.externalMailEncMailBoxSessionKey = encryptKey(externalMailGroupKey, mailboxSessionKey)
   718→						let userGroupData = createCreateExternalUserGroupData()
   719→						userGroupData.mailAddress = cleanedMailAddress
   720→						userGroupData.externalPwEncUserGroupKey = encryptKey(externalUserPwKey, externalUserGroupKey)
   721→						userGroupData.internalUserEncUserGroupKey = encryptKey(this.userFacade.getUserGroupKey(), externalUserGroupKey)
   722→						d.userGroupData = userGroupData
   723→						return this.serviceExecutor.post(ExternalUserService, d).then(() => {
   724→							return {
   725→								externalUserGroupKey: externalUserGroupKey,
   726→								externalMailGroupKey: externalMailGroupKey,
   727→							}
   728→						})
   729→					}),
   730→				)
   731→		})
   732→	}

   734→	entityEventsReceived(data: EntityUpdate[]): Promise<void> {
   735→		return promiseMap(data, (update) => {
   736→			if (
   737→				this.deferredDraftUpdate != null &&
   738→				this.deferredDraftId != null &&
   739→				update.operation === OperationType.UPDATE &&
   740→				isSameTypeRefByAttr(MailTypeRef, update.application, update.type) &&
   741→				isSameId(this.deferredDraftId, [update.instanceListId, update.instanceId])
   742→			) {
   743→				return this.entityClient.load(MailTypeRef, this.deferredDraftId).then((mail) => {
   744→					let deferredPromiseWrapper = assertNotNull(this.deferredDraftUpdate, "deferredDraftUpdate went away?")
   745→					this.deferredDraftUpdate = null
   746→					deferredPromiseWrapper.resolve(mail)
   747→				})
   748→			}
   749→		}).then(noOp)
   750→	}

   773→	_getMailGroupIdForMailAddress(user: User, mailAddress: string): Promise<Id> {
   774→		return promiseFilter(getUserGroupMemberships(user, GroupType.Mail), (groupMembership) => {
   775→			return this.entityClient.load(GroupTypeRef, groupMembership.group).then((mailGroup) => {
   776→				if (mailGroup.user == null) {
   777→					return this.entityClient.load(GroupInfoTypeRef, groupMembership.groupInfo).then((mailGroupInfo) => {
   778→						return contains(getEnabledMailAddressesForGroupInfo(mailGroupInfo), mailAddress)
   779→					})
   780→				} else if (isSameId(mailGroup.user, user._id)) {
   781→					return this.entityClient.load(GroupInfoTypeRef, user.userGroup.groupInfo).then((userGroupInfo) => {
   782→						return contains(getEnabledMailAddressesForGroupInfo(userGroupInfo), mailAddress)
   783→					})
   784→				} else {
   785→					// not supported
   786→					return false
   787→				}
   788→			})
   789→		}).then((filteredMemberships) => {
   790→			if (filteredMemberships.length === 1) {
   791→				return filteredMemberships[0].group
   792→			} else {
   793→				throw new NotFoundError("group for mail address not found " + mailAddress)
   794→			}
   795→		})
   796→	}

   815→export function phishingMarkerValue(type: ReportedMailFieldType, value: string): string {
   816→	return type + murmurHash(value.replace(/\s/g, ""))
   817→}

   819→function parseUrl(link: string): URL | null {
   820→	try {
   821→		return new URL(link)
   822→	} catch (e) {
   823→		return null
   824→	}
   825→}
   826→
   827→function getUrlDomain(link: string): string | null {
   828→	const url = parseUrl(link)
   829→	return url && url.hostname
   830→}

   404→					fileSessionKey,
   405→				)
   406→				return this.createAndEncryptDraftAttachment(referenceTokens, fileSessionKey, providedFile, mailGroupKey)
   407→			} else if (!containsId(existingFileIds, getLetId(providedFile))) {
   408→				// forwarded attachment which was not in the draft before
   409→				return this.crypto.resolveSessionKeyForInstance(providedFile).then((fileSessionKey) => {
   410→					const attachment = createDraftAttachment()
   411→					attachment.existingFile = getLetId(providedFile)
   412→					attachment.ownerEncFileSessionKey = encryptKey(mailGroupKey, assertNotNull(fileSessionKey, "filesessionkey was not resolved"))
   413→					return attachment
   414→				})
   415→			} else {
   416→				return null
   417→			}
   418→		}) // disable concurrent file upload to avoid timeout because of missing progress events on Firefox.
   419→			.then((attachments) => attachments.filter(isNotNull))
   420→			.then((it) => {
   421→				// only delete the temporary files after all attachments have been uploaded
   422→				if (isApp()) {
   423→					this.fileFacade.clearFileData().catch((e) => console.warn("Failed to clear files", e))
   424→				}
   425→
   426→				return it
   427→			})
   428→	}
   429→
   430→	private createAndEncryptDraftAttachment(
   431→		referenceTokens: BlobReferenceTokenWrapper[],
   432→		fileSessionKey: Aes128Key,
   433→		providedFile: DataFile | FileReference,
   434→		mailGroupKey: Aes128Key,
   435→	): DraftAttachment {
   436→		let attachment = createDraftAttachment()
   437→		let newAttachmentData = createNewDraftAttachment()
   438→		newAttachmentData.encFileName = encryptString(fileSessionKey, providedFile.name)
   439→		newAttachmentData.encMimeType = encryptString(fileSessionKey, providedFile.mimeType)
   440→		newAttachmentData.fileData = null
   441→		newAttachmentData.referenceTokens = referenceTokens
   442→		newAttachmentData.encCid = providedFile.cid == null ? null : encryptString(fileSessionKey, providedFile.cid)
   443→		attachment.newFile = newAttachmentData
   444→		attachment.ownerEncFileSessionKey = encryptKey(mailGroupKey, fileSessionKey)
   445→		return attachment
   446→	}

   448→	async sendDraft(draft: Mail, recipients: Array<Recipient>, language: string): Promise<void> {
   449→		const senderMailGroupId = await this._getMailGroupIdForMailAddress(this.userFacade.getLoggedInUser(), draft.sender.address)
   450→		const bucketKey = aes128RandomKey()
   451→		const sendDraftData = createSendDraftData()
   452→		sendDraftData.language = language
   453→		sendDraftData.mail = draft._id
   454→
   455→		const attachments = await this.getAttachmentIds(draft)
   456→		for (let fileId of attachments) {
   457→			const file = await this.entityClient.load(FileTypeRef, fileId)
   458→			const fileSessionKey = assertNotNull(await this.crypto.resolveSessionKeyForInstance(file), "fileSessionKey was null")
   459→			const data = createAttachmentKeyData({
   460→				file: fileId,
   461→			})
   462→
   463→			if (draft.confidential) {
   464→				data.bucketEncFileSessionKey = encryptKey(bucketKey, fileSessionKey)
   465→			} else {
   466→				data.fileSessionKey = keyToUint8Array(fileSessionKey)
   467→			}
   468→
   469→			sendDraftData.attachmentKeyData.push(data)
   470→		}
   471→
   472→		await Promise.all([
   473→			this.entityClient.loadRoot(TutanotaPropertiesTypeRef, this.userFacade.getUserGroupId()).then((tutanotaProperties) => {
   474→				sendDraftData.plaintext = tutanotaProperties.sendPlaintextOnly
   475→			}),
   476→			this.crypto.resolveSessionKeyForInstance(draft).then((mailSessionkey) => {
   477→				let sk = assertNotNull(mailSessionkey, "mailSessionKey was null")
   478→				sendDraftData.calendarMethod = draft.method !== MailMethod.NONE
   479→
   480→				if (draft.confidential) {
   481→					sendDraftData.bucketEncMailSessionKey = encryptKey(bucketKey, sk)
   482→					const hasExternalSecureRecipient = recipients.some((r) => r.type === RecipientType.EXTERNAL && !!this.getContactPassword(r.contact)?.trim())
   483→
   484→					if (hasExternalSecureRecipient) {
   485→						sendDraftData.senderNameUnencrypted = draft.sender.name // needed for notification mail
   486→					}
   487→
   488→					return this._addRecipientKeyData(bucketKey, sendDraftData, recipients, senderMailGroupId)
   489→				} else {
   490→					sendDraftData.mailSessionKey = bitArrayToUint8Array(sk)
   491→				}
   492→			}),
   493→		])
   494→		await this.serviceExecutor.post(SendDraftService, sendDraftData)
   495→	}

   510→	checkMailForPhishing(
   511→		mail: Mail,
   512→		links: Array<{
   513→			href: string
   514→			innerHTML: string
   515→		}>,
   516→	): Promise<boolean> {
   517→		let score = 0
   518→		const senderAddress = mail.sender.address
   519→		const senderAuthenticated = mail.authStatus === MailAuthStatus.AUTHENTICATED
   520→
   521→		if (senderAuthenticated) {
   522→			if (this._checkFieldForPhishing(ReportedMailFieldType.FROM_ADDRESS, senderAddress)) {
   523→				score += 6
   524→			} else {
   525→				const senderDomain = addressDomain(senderAddress)
   526→
   527→				if (this._checkFieldForPhishing(ReportedMailFieldType.FROM_DOMAIN, senderDomain)) {
   528→					score += 6
   529→				}
   530→			}
   531→		} else {
   532→			if (this._checkFieldForPhishing(ReportedMailFieldType.FROM_ADDRESS_NON_AUTH, senderAddress)) {
   533→				score += 6
   534→			} else {
   535→				const senderDomain = addressDomain(senderAddress)
   536→
   537→				if (this._checkFieldForPhishing(ReportedMailFieldType.FROM_DOMAIN_NON_AUTH, senderDomain)) {
   538→					score += 6
   539→				}
   540→			}
   541→		}
   542→
   543→		// We check that subject exists because when there's an encryption error it will be missing
   544→		if (mail.subject && this._checkFieldForPhishing(ReportedMailFieldType.SUBJECT, mail.subject)) {
   545→			score += 3
   546→		}
   547→
   548→		for (const link of links) {
   549→			if (this._checkFieldForPhishing(ReportedMailFieldType.LINK, link.href)) {
   550→				score += 6
   551→				break
   552→			} else {
   553→				const domain = getUrlDomain(link.href)
   554→
   555→				if (domain && this._checkFieldForPhishing(ReportedMailFieldType.LINK_DOMAIN, domain)) {
   556→					score += 6
   557→					break
   558→				}
   559→			}
   560→		}
   561→
   562→		const hasSuspiciousLink = links.some(({ href, innerHTML }) => {
   563→			const innerText = htmlToText(innerHTML)
   564→			const textUrl = parseUrl(innerText)
   565→			const hrefUrl = parseUrl(href)
   566→			return textUrl && hrefUrl && textUrl.hostname !== hrefUrl.hostname
   567→		})
   568→
   569→		if (hasSuspiciousLink) {
   570→			score += 6
   571→		}
   572→
   573→		return Promise.resolve(7 < score)
   574→	}

   599→	async _addRecipientKeyData(bucketKey: Aes128Key, service: SendDraftData, recipients: Array<Recipient>, senderMailGroupId: Id): Promise<void> {
   600→		const notFoundRecipients: string[] = []
   601→
   602→		for (let recipient of recipients) {
   603→			if (recipient.address === "system@tutanota.de" || !recipient) {
   604→				notFoundRecipients.push(recipient.address)
   605→				continue
   606→			}
   607→
   608→			// copy password information if this is an external contact
   609→			// otherwise load the key information from the server
   610→			if (recipient.type === RecipientType.EXTERNAL) {
   611→				const password = this.getContactPassword(recipient.contact)
   612→
   613→				if (password == null || !isSameId(this.userFacade.getGroupId(GroupType.Mail), senderMailGroupId)) {
   614→					// no password given and prevent sending to secure externals from shared group
   615→					notFoundRecipients.push(recipient.address)
   616→					continue
   617→				}
   618→
   619→				const kdfVersion = this.loginFacade.pickKdfType(KdfType.Bcrypt)
   620→				const salt = generateRandomSalt()
   621→				const passwordKey = await this.loginFacade.deriveUserPassphraseKey(kdfVersion, password, salt)
   622→				const passwordVerifier = createAuthVerifier(passwordKey)
   623→				const externalGroupKeys = await this._getExternalGroupKey(recipient.address, passwordKey, passwordVerifier)
   624→				const data = createSecureExternalRecipientKeyData()
   625→				data.mailAddress = recipient.address
   626→				data.symEncBucketKey = null // legacy for old permission system, not used any more
   627→				data.kdfVersion = kdfVersion
   628→				data.ownerEncBucketKey = encryptKey(externalGroupKeys.externalMailGroupKey, bucketKey)
   629→				data.passwordVerifier = passwordVerifier
   630→				data.salt = salt
   631→				data.saltHash = sha256Hash(salt)
   632→				data.pwEncCommunicationKey = encryptKey(passwordKey, externalGroupKeys.externalUserGroupKey)
   633→				service.secureExternalRecipientKeyData.push(data)
   634→			} else {
   635→				const keyData = await this.crypto.encryptBucketKeyForInternalRecipient(bucketKey, recipient.address, notFoundRecipients)
   636→
   637→				if (keyData) {
   638→					service.internalRecipientKeyData.push(keyData)
   639→				}
   640→			}
   641→		}
   642→
   643→		if (notFoundRecipients.length > 0) {
   644→			throw new RecipientsNotFoundError(notFoundRecipients.join("\n"))
   645→		}
   646→	}

   648→	private getContactPassword(contact: Contact | null): string | null {
   649→		return contact?.presharedPassword ?? contact?.autoTransmitPassword ?? null
   650→	}

   652→	/**
   653→	 * Checks that an external user instance with a mail box exists for the given recipient. If it does not exist, it is created.
   654→	 * Returns the user group key and the user mail group key of the external recipient.
   655→	 * @param recipientMailAddress
   656→	 * @param externalUserPwKey The external user's password key.
   657→	 * @param verifier The external user's verifier, base64 encoded.
   658→	 * @return Resolves to the the external user's group key and the external user's mail group key, rejected if an error occured
   659→	 */
   660→	_getExternalGroupKey(
   661→		recipientMailAddress: string,
   662→		externalUserPwKey: Aes128Key,
   663→		verifier: Uint8Array,
   664→	): Promise<{
   665→		externalUserGroupKey: Aes128Key
   666→		externalMailGroupKey: Aes128Key
   667→	}> {
   668→		return this.entityClient.loadRoot(GroupRootTypeRef, this.userFacade.getUserGroupId()).then((groupRoot) => {
   669→			let cleanedMailAddress = recipientMailAddress.trim().toLocaleLowerCase()
   670→			let mailAddressId = stringToCustomId(cleanedMailAddress)
   671→			return this.entityClient
   672→				.load(ExternalUserReferenceTypeRef, [groupRoot.externalUserReferences, mailAddressId])
   673→				.then((externalUserReference) => {
   674→					return this.entityClient.load(UserTypeRef, externalUserReference.user).then((externalUser) => {
   675→						let mailGroupId = assertNotNull(
   676→							externalUser.memberships.find((m) => m.groupType === GroupType.Mail),
   677→							"no mail group membership on external user",
   678→						).group
   679→						return Promise.all([
   680→							this.entityClient.load(GroupTypeRef, mailGroupId),
   681→							this.entityClient.load(GroupTypeRef, externalUserReference.userGroup),
   682→						]).then(([externalMailGroup, externalUserGroup]) => {
   683→							const userAdminKey = assertNotNull(externalUserGroup.adminGroupEncGKey, "no adminGroupEncGKey on external user group")
   684→							const mailAdminKey = assertNotNull(externalMailGroup.adminGroupEncGKey, "no adminGroupEncGKey on external mail group")
   685→							let externalUserGroupKey = decryptKey(this.userFacade.getUserGroupKey(), userAdminKey)
   686→							let externalMailGroupKey = decryptKey(externalUserGroupKey, mailAdminKey)
   687→							return {
   688→								externalUserGroupKey,
   689→								externalMailGroupKey,
   690→							}
   691→						})
   692→					})
   693→				})
   694→				.catch(
   695→					ofClass(NotFoundError, (e) => {
   696→						// it does not exist, so create it
   697→						let internalMailGroupKey = this.userFacade.getGroupKey(this.userFacade.getGroupId(GroupType.Mail))
   698→
   699→						let externalUserGroupKey = aes128RandomKey()
   700→						let externalMailGroupKey = aes128RandomKey()
   701→						let externalUserGroupInfoSessionKey = aes128RandomKey()
   702→						let externalMailGroupInfoSessionKey = aes128RandomKey()
   703→						let clientKey = aes128RandomKey()
   704→						let tutanotaPropertiesSessionKey = aes128RandomKey()
   705→						let mailboxSessionKey = aes128RandomKey()
   706→						let userEncEntropy = encryptBytes(externalUserGroupKey, random.generateRandomData(32))
   707→						let d = createExternalUserData()
   708→						d.verifier = verifier
   709→						d.userEncClientKey = encryptKey(externalUserGroupKey, clientKey)
   710→						d.externalUserEncUserGroupInfoSessionKey = encryptKey(externalUserGroupKey, externalUserGroupInfoSessionKey)
   711→						d.internalMailEncUserGroupInfoSessionKey = encryptKey(internalMailGroupKey, externalUserGroupInfoSessionKey)
   712→						d.externalUserEncMailGroupKey = encryptKey(externalUserGroupKey, externalMailGroupKey)
   713→						d.externalMailEncMailGroupInfoSessionKey = encryptKey(externalMailGroupKey, externalMailGroupInfoSessionKey)
   714→						d.internalMailEncMailGroupInfoSessionKey = encryptKey(internalMailGroupKey, externalMailGroupInfoSessionKey)
   715→						d.externalUserEncEntropy = userEncEntropy
   716→						d.externalUserEncTutanotaPropertiesSessionKey = encryptKey(externalUserGroupKey, tutanotaPropertiesSessionKey)
   717→						d.externalMailEncMailBoxSessionKey = encryptKey(externalMailGroupKey, mailboxSessionKey)
   718→						let userGroupData = createCreateExternalUserGroupData()
   719→						userGroupData.mailAddress = cleanedMailAddress
   720→						userGroupData.externalPwEncUserGroupKey = encryptKey(externalUserPwKey, externalUserGroupKey)
   721→						userGroupData.internalUserEncUserGroupKey = encryptKey(this.userFacade.getUserGroupKey(), externalUserGroupKey)
   722→						d.userGroupData = userGroupData
   723→						return this.serviceExecutor.post(ExternalUserService, d).then(() => {
   724→							return {
   725→								externalUserGroupKey: externalUserGroupKey,
   726→								externalMailGroupKey: externalMailGroupKey,
   727→							}
   728→						})
   729→					}),
   730→				)
   731→		})
   732→	}

   734→	entityEventsReceived(data: EntityUpdate[]): Promise<void> {
   735→		return promiseMap(data, (update) => {
   736→			if (
   737→				this.deferredDraftUpdate != null &&
   738→				this.deferredDraftId != null &&
   739→				update.operation === OperationType.UPDATE &&
   740→				isSameTypeRefByAttr(MailTypeRef, update.application, update.type) &&
   741→				isSameId(this.deferredDraftId, [update.instanceListId, update.instanceId])
   742→			) {
   743→				return this.entityClient.load(MailTypeRef, this.deferredDraftId).then((mail) => {
   744→					let deferredPromiseWrapper = assertNotNull(this.deferredDraftUpdate, "deferredDraftUpdate went away?")
   745→					this.deferredDraftUpdate = null
   746→					deferredPromiseWrapper.resolve(mail)
   747→				})
   748→			}
   749→		}).then(noOp)
   750→	}

   773→	_getMailGroupIdForMailAddress(user: User, mailAddress: string): Promise<Id> {
   774→		return promiseFilter(getUserGroupMemberships(user, GroupType.Mail), (groupMembership) => {
   775→			return this.entityClient.load(GroupTypeRef, groupMembership.group).then((mailGroup) => {
   776→				if (mailGroup.user == null) {
   777→					return this.entityClient.load(GroupInfoTypeRef, groupMembership.groupInfo).then((mailGroupInfo) => {
   778→						return contains(getEnabledMailAddressesForGroupInfo(mailGroupInfo), mailAddress)
   779→					})
   780→				} else if (isSameId(mailGroup.user, user._id)) {
   781→					return this.entityClient.load(GroupInfoTypeRef, user.userGroup.groupInfo).then((userGroupInfo) => {
   782→						return contains(getEnabledMailAddressesForGroupInfo(userGroupInfo), mailAddress)
   783→					})
   784→				} else {
   785→					// not supported
   786→					return false
   787→				}
   788→			})
   789→		}).then((filteredMemberships) => {
   790→			if (filteredMemberships.length === 1) {
   791→				return filteredMemberships[0].group
   792→			} else {
   793→				throw new NotFoundError("group for mail address not found " + mailAddress)
   794→			}
   795→		})
   796→	}

   815→export function phishingMarkerValue(type: ReportedMailFieldType, value: string): string {

   819→function parseUrl(link: string): URL | null {
   820→	try {
   821→		return new URL(link)
   822→	} catch (e) {
   823→		return null
   824→	}
   825→}

   827→function getUrlDomain(link: string): string | null {
   828→	const url = parseUrl(link)
   829→	return url && url.hostname
   830→}

   152→export class MailFacade {
   153→	private phishingMarkers: Set<string> = new Set()
   154→	private deferredDraftId: IdTuple | null = null // the mail id of the draft that we are waiting for to be updated via websocket
   155→	private deferredDraftUpdate: Record<string, any> | null = null // this deferred promise is resolved as soon as the update of the draft is received
   156→
   157→	constructor(
   158→		private readonly userFacade: UserFacade,
   159→		private readonly fileFacade: FileFacade,
   160→		private readonly entityClient: EntityClient,
   161→		private readonly crypto: CryptoFacade,

   168→	async createMailFolder(name: string, parent: IdTuple | null, ownerGroupId: Id): Promise<void> {
   169→		const mailGroupKey = this.userFacade.getGroupKey(ownerGroupId)
   170→
   171→		const sk = aes128RandomKey()
   172→		const newFolder = createCreateMailFolderData({
   173→			folderName: name,
   174→			parentFolder: parent,
   175→			ownerEncSessionKey: encryptKey(mailGroupKey, sk),
   176→			ownerGroup: ownerGroupId,
   177→		})
   178→		await this.serviceExecutor.post(MailFolderService, newFolder, { sessionKey: sk })
   179→	}

   181→	/**
   182→	 * Updates a mail folder's name, if needed
   183→	 * @param newName - if this is the same as the folder's current name, nothing is done
   184→	 */
   185→	async updateMailFolderName(folder: MailFolder, newName: string): Promise<void> {
   186→		if (newName !== folder.name) {
   187→			folder.name = newName
   188→			await this.entityClient.update(folder)
   189→		}
   190→	}
   191→
   192→	/**
   193→	 * Updates a mail folder's parent, if needed
   194→	 * @param newParent - if this is the same as the folder's current parent, nothing is done
   195→	 */
   196→	async updateMailFolderParent(folder: MailFolder, newParent: IdTuple | null): Promise<void> {
   197→		if (
   198→			(folder.parentFolder != null && newParent != null && !isSameId(folder.parentFolder, newParent)) ||
   199→			(folder.parentFolder == null && newParent != null) ||
   200→			(folder.parentFolder != null && newParent == null)
   201→		) {
   202→			const updateFolder = createUpdateMailFolderData({
   203→				folder: folder._id,
   204→				newParent: newParent,
   205→			})
   206→			await this.serviceExecutor.put(MailFolderService, updateFolder)
   207→		}
   208→	}

   210→	/**
   211→	 * Creates a draft mail.
   212→	 * @param bodyText The bodyText of the mail formatted as HTML.
   213→	 * @param previousMessageId The id of the message that this mail is a reply or forward to. Null if this is a new mail.
   214→	 * @param attachments The files that shall be attached to this mail or null if no files shall be attached. TutanotaFiles are already exising on the server, DataFiles are files from the local file system. Attention: the DataFile class information is lost
   215→	 * @param confidential True if the mail shall be sent end-to-end encrypted, false otherwise.
   216→	 */
   217→	async createDraft({
   218→		subject,
   219→		bodyText,
   220→		senderMailAddress,
   221→		senderName,
   222→		toRecipients,
   223→		ccRecipients,
   224→		bccRecipients,
   225→		conversationType,
   226→		previousMessageId,
   227→		attachments,
   228→		confidential,
   229→		replyTos,
   230→		method,
   231→	}: CreateDraftParams): Promise<Mail> {
   232→		if (byteLength(bodyText) > UNCOMPRESSED_MAX_SIZE) {
   233→			throw new MailBodyTooLargeError(`Can't update draft, mail body too large (${byteLength(bodyText)})`)
   234→		}
   235→
   236→		const senderMailGroupId = await this._getMailGroupIdForMailAddress(this.userFacade.getLoggedInUser(), senderMailAddress)
   237→
   238→		const userGroupKey = this.userFacade.getUserGroupKey()
   239→
   240→		const mailGroupKey = this.userFacade.getGroupKey(senderMailGroupId)
   241→
   242→		const sk = aes128RandomKey()
   243→		const service = createDraftCreateData()
   244→		service.previousMessageId = previousMessageId
   245→		service.conversationType = conversationType
   246→		service.ownerEncSessionKey = encryptKey(mailGroupKey, sk)
   247→		service.symEncSessionKey = encryptKey(userGroupKey, sk) // legacy
   248→
   249→		service.draftData = createDraftData({
   250→			subject,
   251→			compressedBodyText: bodyText,
   252→			senderMailAddress,
   253→			senderName,
   254→			confidential,
   255→			method,
   256→			toRecipients: toRecipients.map(recipientToDraftRecipient),
   257→			ccRecipients: ccRecipients.map(recipientToDraftRecipient),
   258→			bccRecipients: bccRecipients.map(recipientToDraftRecipient),
   259→			replyTos: replyTos.map(recipientToEncryptedMailAddress),
   260→			addedAttachments: await this._createAddedAttachments(attachments, [], senderMailGroupId, mailGroupKey),
   261→		})
   262→		const createDraftReturn = await this.serviceExecutor.post(DraftService, service, { sessionKey: sk })
   263→		return this.entityClient.load(MailTypeRef, createDraftReturn.draft)
   264→	}
   265→
   266→	/**
   267→	 * Updates a draft mail.
   268→	 * @param subject The subject of the mail.
   269→	 * @param body The body text of the mail.
   270→	 * @param senderMailAddress The senders mail address.
   271→	 * @param senderName The name of the sender that is sent together with the mail address of the sender.
   272→	 * @param toRecipients The recipients the mail shall be sent to.
   273→	 * @param ccRecipients The recipients the mail shall be sent to in cc.
   274→	 * @param bccRecipients The recipients the mail shall be sent to in bcc.
   275→	 * @param attachments The files that shall be attached to this mail or null if the current attachments shall not be changed.
   276→	 * @param confidential True if the mail shall be sent end-to-end encrypted, false otherwise.
   277→	 * @param draft The draft to update.
   278→	 * @return The updated draft. Rejected with TooManyRequestsError if the number allowed mails was exceeded, AccessBlockedError if the customer is not allowed to send emails currently because he is marked for approval.
   279→	 */
   280→	async updateDraft({
   281→		subject,
   282→		body,
   283→		senderMailAddress,
   284→		senderName,
   285→		toRecipients,
   286→		ccRecipients,
   287→		bccRecipients,
   288→		attachments,
   289→		confidential,
   290→		draft,
   291→	}: UpdateDraftParams): Promise<Mail> {
   292→		if (byteLength(body) > UNCOMPRESSED_MAX_SIZE) {
   293→			throw new MailBodyTooLargeError(`Can't update draft, mail body too large (${byteLength(body)})`)
   294→		}
   295→
   296→		const senderMailGroupId = await this._getMailGroupIdForMailAddress(this.userFacade.getLoggedInUser(), senderMailAddress)
   297→
   298→		const mailGroupKey = this.userFacade.getGroupKey(senderMailGroupId)
   299→		const currentAttachments = await this.getAttachmentIds(draft)
   300→		const replyTos = await this.getReplyTos(draft)
   301→
   302→		const sk = decryptKey(mailGroupKey, draft._ownerEncSessionKey as any)
   303→		const service = createDraftUpdateData()
   304→		service.draft = draft._id
   305→		service.draftData = createDraftData({
   306→			subject: subject,
   307→			compressedBodyText: body,
   308→			senderMailAddress: senderMailAddress,
   309→			senderName: senderName,
   310→			confidential: confidential,
   311→			method: draft.method,
   312→			toRecipients: toRecipients.map(recipientToDraftRecipient),
   313→			ccRecipients: ccRecipients.map(recipientToDraftRecipient),
   314→			bccRecipients: bccRecipients.map(recipientToDraftRecipient),
   315→			replyTos: replyTos,
   316→			removedAttachments: this._getRemovedAttachments(attachments, currentAttachments),
   317→			addedAttachments: await this._createAddedAttachments(attachments, currentAttachments, senderMailGroupId, mailGroupKey),
   318→		})
   319→		this.deferredDraftId = draft._id
   320→		// we have to wait for the updated mail because sendMail() might be called right after this update
   321→		this.deferredDraftUpdate = defer()
   322→		// use a local reference here because this._deferredDraftUpdate is set to null when the event is received async
   323→		const deferredUpdatePromiseWrapper = this.deferredDraftUpdate
   324→		await this.serviceExecutor.put(DraftService, service, { sessionKey: sk })
   325→		return deferredUpdatePromiseWrapper.promise
   326→	}
   327→

   350→	/**
   351→	 * Returns all ids of the files that have been removed, i.e. that are contained in the existingFileIds but not in the provided files
   352→	 */
   353→	_getRemovedAttachments(providedFiles: Attachments | null, existingFileIds: IdTuple[]): IdTuple[] {
   354→		let removedAttachmentIds: IdTuple[] = []
   355→
   356→		if (providedFiles != null) {
   357→			let attachments = providedFiles
   358→			// check which attachments have been removed
   359→			existingFileIds.forEach((fileId) => {
   360→				if (
   361→					!attachments.find(
   362→						(attachment) => attachment._type !== "DataFile" && attachment._type !== "FileReference" && isSameId(getLetId(attachment), fileId),
   363→					)
   364→				) {
   365→					removedAttachmentIds.push(fileId)
   366→				}
   367→			})
   368→		}
   369→
   370→		return removedAttachmentIds
   371→	}
   372→
   373→	/**
   374→	 * Uploads the given data files or sets the file if it is already existing files (e.g. forwarded files) and returns all DraftAttachments
   375→	 */
   376→	async _createAddedAttachments(
   377→		providedFiles: Attachments | null,
   378→		existingFileIds: ReadonlyArray<IdTuple>,
   379→		senderMailGroupId: Id,
   380→		mailGroupKey: Aes128Key,
   381→	): Promise<DraftAttachment[]> {
   382→		if (providedFiles == null || providedFiles.length === 0) return []
   383→
   384→		return promiseMap(providedFiles, async (providedFile) => {
   385→			// check if this is a new attachment or an existing one
   386→			if (isDataFile(providedFile)) {
   387→				// user added attachment
   388→				const fileSessionKey = aes128RandomKey()
   389→				let referenceTokens: Array<BlobReferenceTokenWrapper>
   390→				if (isApp() || isDesktop()) {
   391→					const { location } = await this.fileApp.writeDataFile(providedFile)
   392→					referenceTokens = await this.blobFacade.encryptAndUploadNative(ArchiveDataType.Attachments, location, senderMailGroupId, fileSessionKey)
   393→					await this.fileApp.deleteFile(location)
   394→				} else {
   395→					referenceTokens = await this.blobFacade.encryptAndUpload(ArchiveDataType.Attachments, providedFile.data, senderMailGroupId, fileSessionKey)
   396→				}
   397→				return this.createAndEncryptDraftAttachment(referenceTokens, fileSessionKey, providedFile, mailGroupKey)
   398→			} else if (isFileReference(providedFile)) {
   399→				const fileSessionKey = aes128RandomKey()
   400→				const referenceTokens = await this.blobFacade.encryptAndUploadNative(
   401→					ArchiveDataType.Attachments,
   402→					providedFile.location,
   403→					senderMailGroupId,
   404→					fileSessionKey,
   405→				)
   406→				return this.createAndEncryptDraftAttachment(referenceTokens, fileSessionKey, providedFile, mailGroupKey)
   407→			} else if (!containsId(existingFileIds, getLetId(providedFile))) {
   408→				// forwarded attachment which was not in the draft before
   409→				return this.crypto.resolveSessionKeyForInstance(providedFile).then((fileSessionKey) => {
   410→					const attachment = createDraftAttachment()
   411→					attachment.existingFile = getLetId(providedFile)
   412→					attachment.ownerEncFileSessionKey = encryptKey(mailGroupKey, assertNotNull(fileSessionKey, "filesessionkey was not resolved"))
   413→					return attachment
   414→				})
   415→			} else {
   416→				return null
   417→			}
   418→		}) // disable concurrent file upload to avoid timeout because of missing progress events on Firefox.
   419→			.then((attachments) => attachments.filter(isNotNull))
   420→			.then((it) => {
   421→				// only delete the temporary files after all attachments have been uploaded
   422→				if (isApp()) {
   423→					this.fileFacade.clearFileData().catch((e) => console.warn("Failed to clear files", e))
   424→				}
   425→
   426→				return it
   427→			})
   428→	}
   429→
   430→	private createAndEncryptDraftAttachment(
   431→		referenceTokens: BlobReferenceTokenWrapper[],
   432→		fileSessionKey: Aes128Key,
   433→		providedFile: DataFile | FileReference,
   434→		mailGroupKey: Aes128Key,
   435→	): DraftAttachment {
   436→		let attachment = createDraftAttachment()
   437→		let newAttachmentData = createNewDraftAttachment()
   438→		newAttachmentData.encFileName = encryptString(fileSessionKey, providedFile.name)
   439→		newAttachmentData.encMimeType = encryptString(fileSessionKey, providedFile.mimeType)
   440→		newAttachmentData.fileData = null
   441→		newAttachmentData.referenceTokens = referenceTokens
   442→		newAttachmentData.encCid = providedFile.cid == null ? null : encryptString(fileSessionKey, providedFile.cid)
   443→		attachment.newFile = newAttachmentData
   444→		attachment.ownerEncFileSessionKey = encryptKey(mailGroupKey, fileSessionKey)
   445→		return attachment
   446→	}

   448→	async sendDraft(draft: Mail, recipients: Array<Recipient>, language: string): Promise<void> {
   449→		const senderMailGroupId = await this._getMailGroupIdForMailAddress(this.userFacade.getLoggedInUser(), draft.sender.address)
   450→		const bucketKey = aes128RandomKey()
   451→		const sendDraftData = createSendDraftData()
   452→		sendDraftData.language = language
   453→		sendDraftData.mail = draft._id
   454→
   455→		const attachments = await this.getAttachmentIds(draft)
   456→		for (let fileId of attachments) {
   457→			const file = await this.entityClient.load(FileTypeRef, fileId)
   458→			const fileSessionKey = assertNotNull(await this.crypto.resolveSessionKeyForInstance(file), "fileSessionKey was null")
   459→			const data = createAttachmentKeyData({
   460→				file: fileId,
   461→			})
   462→
   463→			if (draft.confidential) {
   464→				data.bucketEncFileSessionKey = encryptKey(bucketKey, fileSessionKey)
   465→			} else {
   466→				data.fileSessionKey = keyToUint8Array(fileSessionKey)
   467→			}
   468→
   469→			sendDraftData.attachmentKeyData.push(data)
   470→		}
   471→
   472→		await Promise.all([
   473→			this.entityClient.loadRoot(TutanotaPropertiesTypeRef, this.userFacade.getUserGroupId()).then((tutanotaProperties) => {
   474→				sendDraftData.plaintext = tutanotaProperties.sendPlaintextOnly
   475→			}),
   476→			this.crypto.resolveSessionKeyForInstance(draft).then((mailSessionkey) => {
   477→				let sk = assertNotNull(mailSessionkey, "mailSessionKey was null")
   478→				sendDraftData.calendarMethod = draft.method !== MailMethod.NONE
   479→
   480→				if (draft.confidential) {
   481→					sendDraftData.bucketEncMailSessionKey = encryptKey(bucketKey, sk)
   482→					const hasExternalSecureRecipient = recipients.some((r) => r.type === RecipientType.EXTERNAL && !!this.getContactPassword(r.contact)?.trim())
   483→
   484→					if (hasExternalSecureRecipient) {
   485→						sendDraftData.senderNameUnencrypted = draft.sender.name // needed for notification mail
   486→					}
   487→
   488→					return this._addRecipientKeyData(bucketKey, sendDraftData, recipients, senderMailGroupId)
   489→				} else {
   490→					sendDraftData.mailSessionKey = bitArrayToUint8Array(sk)
   491→				}
   492→			}),
   493→		])
   494→		await this.serviceExecutor.post(SendDraftService, sendDraftData)
   495→	}

   498→		return draft.attachments

   501→	async getReplyTos(draft: Mail): Promise<EncryptedMailAddress[]> {
   502→		if (isLegacyMail(draft)) {
   503→			return draft.replyTos
   504→		} else {
   505→			const mailDetails = await this.entityClient.load(MailDetailsDraftTypeRef, assertNotNull(draft.mailDetailsDraft, "draft without mailDetailsDraft"))
   506→			return mailDetails.details.replyTos
   507→		}
   508→	}

   510→	checkMailForPhishing(
   511→		mail: Mail,
   512→		links: Array<{
   513→			href: string
   514→			innerHTML: string
   515→		}>,
   516→	): Promise<boolean> {
   517→		let score = 0
   518→		const senderAddress = mail.sender.address
   519→		const senderAuthenticated = mail.authStatus === MailAuthStatus.AUTHENTICATED
   520→
   521→		if (senderAuthenticated) {
   522→			if (this._checkFieldForPhishing(ReportedMailFieldType.FROM_ADDRESS, senderAddress)) {
   523→				score += 6
   524→			} else {
   525→				const senderDomain = addressDomain(senderAddress)
   526→
   527→				if (this._checkFieldForPhishing(ReportedMailFieldType.FROM_DOMAIN, senderDomain)) {
   528→					score += 6
   529→				}
   530→			}
   531→		} else {
   532→			if (this._checkFieldForPhishing(ReportedMailFieldType.FROM_ADDRESS_NON_AUTH, senderAddress)) {
   533→				score += 6
   534→			} else {
   535→				const senderDomain = addressDomain(senderAddress)
   536→
   537→				if (this._checkFieldForPhishing(ReportedMailFieldType.FROM_DOMAIN_NON_AUTH, senderDomain)) {
   538→					score += 6
   539→				}
   540→			}
   541→		}
   542→
   543→		// We check that subject exists because when there's an encryption error it will be missing
   544→		if (mail.subject && this._checkFieldForPhishing(ReportedMailFieldType.SUBJECT, mail.subject)) {
   545→			score += 3
   546→		}
   547→
   548→		for (const link of links) {
   549→			if (this._checkFieldForPhishing(ReportedMailFieldType.LINK, link.href)) {
   550→				score += 6
   551→				break
   552→			} else {
   553→				const domain = getUrlDomain(link.href)
   554→
   555→				if (domain && this._checkFieldForPhishing(ReportedMailFieldType.LINK_DOMAIN, domain)) {
   556→					score += 6
   557→					break
   558→				}
   559→			}
   560→		}
   561→
   562→		const hasSuspiciousLink = links.some(({ href, innerHTML }) => {
   563→			const innerText = htmlToText(innerHTML)
   564→			const textUrl = parseUrl(innerText)
   565→			const hrefUrl = parseUrl(href)
   566→			return textUrl && hrefUrl && textUrl.hostname !== hrefUrl.hostname
   567→		})
   568→
   569→		if (hasSuspiciousLink) {
   570→			score += 6
   571→		}
   572→
   573→		return Promise.resolve(7 < score)
   574→	}

   589→			value: String(unreadMails),
   590→		})
   591→		await this.serviceExecutor.post(CounterService, data)
   592→	}
   593→
   594→	_checkFieldForPhishing(type: ReportedMailFieldType, value: string): boolean {
   595→		const hash = phishingMarkerValue(type, value)
   596→		return this.phishingMarkers.has(hash)
   597→	}
   598→
   599→	async _addRecipientKeyData(bucketKey: Aes128Key, service: SendDraftData, recipients: Array<Recipient>, senderMailGroupId: Id): Promise<void> {
   600→		const notFoundRecipients: string[] = []
   601→
   602→		for (let recipient of recipients) {
   603→			if (recipient.address === "system@tutanota.de" || !recipient) {
   604→				notFoundRecipients.push(recipient.address)
   605→				continue
   606→			}
   607→
   608→			// copy password information if this is an external contact
   609→			// otherwise load the key information from the server
   610→			if (recipient.type === RecipientType.EXTERNAL) {
   611→				const password = this.getContactPassword(recipient.contact)
   612→
   613→				if (password == null || !isSameId(this.userFacade.getGroupId(GroupType.Mail), senderMailGroupId)) {
   614→					// no password given and prevent sending to secure externals from shared group
   615→					notFoundRecipients.push(recipient.address)
   616→					continue
   617→				}
   618→
   619→				const kdfVersion = this.loginFacade.pickKdfType(KdfType.Bcrypt)
   620→				const salt = generateRandomSalt()
   621→				const passwordKey = await this.loginFacade.deriveUserPassphraseKey(kdfVersion, password, salt)
   622→				const passwordVerifier = createAuthVerifier(passwordKey)
   623→				const externalGroupKeys = await this._getExternalGroupKey(recipient.address, passwordKey, passwordVerifier)
   624→				const data = createSecureExternalRecipientKeyData()
   625→				data.mailAddress = recipient.address
   626→				data.symEncBucketKey = null // legacy for old permission system, not used any more
   627→				data.kdfVersion = kdfVersion
   628→				data.ownerEncBucketKey = encryptKey(externalGroupKeys.externalMailGroupKey, bucketKey)
   629→				data.passwordVerifier = passwordVerifier
   630→				data.salt = salt
   631→				data.saltHash = sha256Hash(salt)
   632→				data.pwEncCommunicationKey = encryptKey(passwordKey, externalGroupKeys.externalUserGroupKey)
   633→				service.secureExternalRecipientKeyData.push(data)
   634→			} else {
   635→				const keyData = await this.crypto.encryptBucketKeyForInternalRecipient(bucketKey, recipient.address, notFoundRecipients)
   636→
   637→				if (keyData) {
   638→					service.internalRecipientKeyData.push(keyData)
   639→				}
   640→			}
   641→		}
   642→
   643→		if (notFoundRecipients.length > 0) {
   644→			throw new RecipientsNotFoundError(notFoundRecipients.join("\n"))
   645→		}
   646→	}
   647→
   648→	private getContactPassword(contact: Contact | null): string | null {
   649→		return contact?.presharedPassword ?? contact?.autoTransmitPassword ?? null
   650→	}
   651→
   652→	/**
   653→	 * Checks that an external user instance with a mail box exists for the given recipient. If it does not exist, it is created.
   654→	 * Returns the user group key and the user mail group key of the external recipient.
   655→	 * @param recipientMailAddress
   656→	 * @param externalUserPwKey The external user's password key.
   657→	 * @param verifier The external user's verifier, base64 encoded.
   658→	 * @return Resolves to the the external user's group key and the external user's mail group key, rejected if an error occured
   659→	 */
   660→	_getExternalGroupKey(
   661→		recipientMailAddress: string,
   662→		externalUserPwKey: Aes128Key,
   663→		verifier: Uint8Array,
   664→	): Promise<{
   665→		externalUserGroupKey: Aes128Key
   666→		externalMailGroupKey: Aes128Key
   667→	}> {
   668→		return this.entityClient.loadRoot(GroupRootTypeRef, this.userFacade.getUserGroupId()).then((groupRoot) => {
   669→			let cleanedMailAddress = recipientMailAddress.trim().toLocaleLowerCase()
   670→			let mailAddressId = stringToCustomId(cleanedMailAddress)
   671→			return this.entityClient
   672→				.load(ExternalUserReferenceTypeRef, [groupRoot.externalUserReferences, mailAddressId])
   673→				.then((externalUserReference) => {
   674→					return this.entityClient.load(UserTypeRef, externalUserReference.user).then((externalUser) => {
   675→						let mailGroupId = assertNotNull(
   676→							externalUser.memberships.find((m) => m.groupType === GroupType.Mail),
   677→							"no mail group membership on external user",
   678→						).group
   679→						return Promise.all([
   680→							this.entityClient.load(GroupTypeRef, mailGroupId),
   681→							this.entityClient.load(GroupTypeRef, externalUserReference.userGroup),
   682→						]).then(([externalMailGroup, externalUserGroup]) => {
   683→							const userAdminKey = assertNotNull(externalUserGroup.adminGroupEncGKey, "no adminGroupEncGKey on external user group")
   684→							const mailAdminKey = assertNotNull(externalMailGroup.adminGroupEncGKey, "no adminGroupEncGKey on external mail group")
   685→							let externalUserGroupKey = decryptKey(this.userFacade.getUserGroupKey(), userAdminKey)
   686→							let externalMailGroupKey = decryptKey(externalUserGroupKey, mailAdminKey)
   687→							return {
   688→								externalUserGroupKey,
   689→								externalMailGroupKey,
   690→							}
   691→						})
   692→					})
   693→				})
   694→				.catch(
   695→					ofClass(NotFoundError, (e) => {
   696→						// it does not exist, so create it
   697→						let internalMailGroupKey = this.userFacade.getGroupKey(this.userFacade.getGroupId(GroupType.Mail))
   698→
   699→						let externalUserGroupKey = aes128RandomKey()
   700→						let externalMailGroupKey = aes128RandomKey()
   701→						let externalUserGroupInfoSessionKey = aes128RandomKey()
   702→						let externalMailGroupInfoSessionKey = aes128RandomKey()
   703→						let clientKey = aes128RandomKey()
   704→						let tutanotaPropertiesSessionKey = aes128RandomKey()
   705→						let mailboxSessionKey = aes128RandomKey()
   706→						let userEncEntropy = encryptBytes(externalUserGroupKey, random.generateRandomData(32))
   707→						let d = createExternalUserData()
   708→						d.verifier = verifier
   709→						d.userEncClientKey = encryptKey(externalUserGroupKey, clientKey)
   710→						d.externalUserEncUserGroupInfoSessionKey = encryptKey(externalUserGroupKey, externalUserGroupInfoSessionKey)
   711→						d.internalMailEncUserGroupInfoSessionKey = encryptKey(internalMailGroupKey, externalUserGroupInfoSessionKey)
   712→						d.externalUserEncMailGroupKey = encryptKey(externalUserGroupKey, externalMailGroupKey)
   713→						d.externalMailEncMailGroupInfoSessionKey = encryptKey(externalMailGroupKey, externalMailGroupInfoSessionKey)
   714→						d.internalMailEncMailGroupInfoSessionKey = encryptKey(internalMailGroupKey, externalMailGroupInfoSessionKey)
   715→						d.externalUserEncEntropy = userEncEntropy
   716→						d.externalUserEncTutanotaPropertiesSessionKey = encryptKey(externalUserGroupKey, tutanotaPropertiesSessionKey)
   717→						d.externalMailEncMailBoxSessionKey = encryptKey(externalMailGroupKey, mailboxSessionKey)
   718→						let userGroupData = createCreateExternalUserGroupData()
   719→						userGroupData.mailAddress = cleanedMailAddress
   720→						userGroupData.externalPwEncUserGroupKey = encryptKey(externalUserPwKey, externalUserGroupKey)
   721→						userGroupData.internalUserEncUserGroupKey = encryptKey(this.userFacade.getUserGroupKey(), externalUserGroupKey)
   722→						d.userGroupData = userGroupData
   723→						return this.serviceExecutor.post(ExternalUserService, d).then(() => {
   724→							return {
   725→								externalUserGroupKey: externalUserGroupKey,
   726→								externalMailGroupKey: externalMailGroupKey,
   727→							}
   728→						})
   729→					}),
   730→				)
   731→		})
   732→	}
   733→
   734→	entityEventsReceived(data: EntityUpdate[]): Promise<void> {
   735→		return promiseMap(data, (update) => {
   736→			if (
   737→				this.deferredDraftUpdate != null &&
   738→				this.deferredDraftId != null &&
   739→				update.operation === OperationType.UPDATE &&
   740→				isSameTypeRefByAttr(MailTypeRef, update.application, update.type) &&
   741→				isSameId(this.deferredDraftId, [update.instanceListId, update.instanceId])
   742→			) {
   743→				return this.entityClient.load(MailTypeRef, this.deferredDraftId).then((mail) => {
   744→					let deferredPromiseWrapper = assertNotNull(this.deferredDraftUpdate, "deferredDraftUpdate went away?")
   745→					this.deferredDraftUpdate = null
   746→					deferredPromiseWrapper.resolve(mail)
   747→				})
   748→			}
   749→		}).then(noOp)
   750→	}
   751→
   752→	phishingMarkersUpdateReceived(markers: Array<PhishingMarker>) {
   753→		markers.forEach((marker) => {
   754→			if (marker.status === PhishingMarkerStatus.INACTIVE) {
   755→				this.phishingMarkers.delete(marker.marker)
   756→			} else {
   757→				this.phishingMarkers.add(marker.marker)
   758→			}
   759→		})
   760→	}
   761→
   762→	getRecipientKeyData(mailAddress: string): Promise<PublicKeyReturn | null> {
   763→		return this.serviceExecutor
   764→			.get(
   765→				PublicKeyService,
   766→				createPublicKeyData({
   767→					mailAddress,
   768→				}),
   769→			)
   770→			.catch(ofClass(NotFoundError, () => null))
   771→	}
   772→
   773→	_getMailGroupIdForMailAddress(user: User, mailAddress: string): Promise<Id> {
   774→		return promiseFilter(getUserGroupMemberships(user, GroupType.Mail), (groupMembership) => {
   775→			return this.entityClient.load(GroupTypeRef, groupMembership.group).then((mailGroup) => {
   776→				if (mailGroup.user == null) {
   777→					return this.entityClient.load(GroupInfoTypeRef, groupMembership.groupInfo).then((mailGroupInfo) => {
   778→						return contains(getEnabledMailAddressesForGroupInfo(mailGroupInfo), mailAddress)
   779→					})
   780→				} else if (isSameId(mailGroup.user, user._id)) {
   781→					return this.entityClient.load(GroupInfoTypeRef, user.userGroup.groupInfo).then((userGroupInfo) => {
   782→						return contains(getEnabledMailAddressesForGroupInfo(userGroupInfo), mailAddress)
   783→					})
   784→				} else {
   785→					// not supported
   786→					return false
   787→				}
   788→			})
   789→		}).then((filteredMemberships) => {
   790→			if (filteredMemberships.length === 1) {
   791→				return filteredMemberships[0].group
   792→			} else {
   793→				throw new NotFoundError("group for mail address not found " + mailAddress)
   794→			}
   795→		})
   796→	}
   797→
   798→	async clearFolder(folderId: IdTuple) {
   799→		const deleteMailData = createDeleteMailData({
   800→			folder: folderId,
   801→		})
   802→		await this.serviceExecutor.delete(MailService, deleteMailData)
   803→	}
   804→
   805→	async unsubscribe(mailId: IdTuple, recipient: string, headers: string[]) {
   806→		const postData = createListUnsubscribeData({
   807→			mail: mailId,
   808→			recipient,
   809→			headers: headers.join("\n"),
   810→		})
   811→		await this.serviceExecutor.post(ListUnsubscribeService, postData)
   812→	}
   813→}
   814→
   815→export function phishingMarkerValue(type: ReportedMailFieldType, value: string): string {
   816→	return type + murmurHash(value.replace(/\s/g, ""))
   817→}
   818→
   819→function parseUrl(link: string): URL | null {
   820→	try {
   821→		return new URL(link)
   822→	} catch (e) {
   823→		return null
   824→	}
   825→}
   826→
   827→function getUrlDomain(link: string): string | null {
   828→	const url = parseUrl(link)
   829→	return url && url.hostname
   830→}
   831→
   832→function recipientToDraftRecipient(recipient: PartialRecipient): DraftRecipient {
   833→	return createDraftRecipient({
   834→		name: recipient.name ?? "",
   835→		mailAddress: recipient.address,
   836→	})
   837→}
   838→
   839→function recipientToEncryptedMailAddress(recipient: PartialRecipient): EncryptedMailAddress {
   840→	return createEncryptedMailAddress({
   841→		name: recipient.name ?? "",
   842→		address: recipient.address,
   843→	})
   844→}
   845→
